prompt: A depth map of a dense forest, with close-up trees appearing light and distant foliage blending into darker shades.
prompt_refined: Generate a grayscale depth map of a dense forest. Closer elements should appear brighter (closer to white), while more distant foliage should progressively darken (closer to black).
objects: Closer elements of the forest (closer to white)
More distant foliage of the forest (closer to black)
